name: Naye Parivaar Ka Swagat
desc: The society eagerly prepares to welcome a new member. However, later, Bhoothnath arrives with shocking news that changes everything.

name: Waiting For The New Family
desc: All the colony members are excited about the new family moving in, but there's also a hint of concern about whether they'll get along. Who will their new neighbours be?

name: Sonu's Special Dinner
desc: Sonu prepares a special dinner for Bhide and invites all her friends to join. Later, Bhide learns that a new family will soon be moving into Gokuldham Colony. Who could they be?

name: Bhootnaath Kidhar Hai?
desc: The colony members are relieved to have electricity restored after a stressful period. However, Bhide and Popatlal remain worried, as Bhootnath has not responded or provided any update on the renovation.

name: Bhide Ki Galti
desc: Abdul comes out and informs everyone that he doesn't have the keys and that the electrician has them. This angers the colony members, who blame Bhide for the mishap. Will Bhide be able to find a solution?

name: Meter Box Ki Chaabi Kaha Hai?
desc: The entire colony gathers to play table tennis while waiting for Bhide to return with the keys. Will he have them so the electricity can finally be restored?

name: Gokuldham Members Ko Laga Shock
desc: The Gokuldham residents panic after an electric shock incident and rush to turn off the main switch, only to realize the keys are missing. With no other option, they call Bhide for help.

name: Defective Samaan
desc: Babita confronts Jethalal after getting an electric shock from a faulty appliance she bought from him. As more complaints start pouring in, Jethalal is left scrambling to understand what's causing the issue.

name: Bhide Ke Khilaaf Saboot
desc: With the entire colony watching, Popatlal urges Bhide to open a sealed box he claims contains proof of wrongdoing. Will Bhide be able to defend himself?

name: Bhide Pe Aarop
desc: As Bhide prepares for a day out with his wife, Popatlal unexpectedly calls for a meeting and accuses him of something serious. What has triggered Popatlal's anger this time?

name: Gogi Comes Clean
desc: Gogi gathers his friends and family to confess everything about why he took money from them. Will they understand his reasons or be too hurt to forgive him?

name: Finding Gogi
desc: Everyone is worried because Gogi is nowhere to be found, and Tapu Sena is going wild trying to locate him. Will they find him safe and sound?

name: Sodhi's Vow
desc: Rita Reporter arrives at the society to broadcast the news, hoping it reaches Gogi. Hearing this, Sodhi vows not to eat or drink until Gogi returns. Will their efforts lead to Gogi's return?

name: Gogi Ki Talash
desc: Tapu Sena, Popatlal, and Sodhi search high and low for Gogi, who has vanished along with the money. Their hunt leads them to Rocky's parents. Where is Gogi?

name: Gogi Kaha Hai?
desc: Gogi goes missing, leaving his family and neighbours shocked as they realise he borrowed money from all of them using different excuses. Will they track him down and confront him?

name: Gogi In Big Trouble
desc: After suffering a major loss on the fantasy app, Gogi finds himself drowning in debt. Will he come clean or dig himself deeper into trouble?

name: Gogi Ko Hua Loss
desc: Gogi is stressed as he can't make the profit he needs to pay back his loans. With pressure building from all sides, will he find a way out?

name: Gogi's Web Of Lies
desc: Desperate to win big, Gogi lies to Popatlal and borrows ten thousand rupees. With mounting debts and tangled lies, will Gogi be able to escape the trouble he has created for himself?

name: Gogi Ka Online Course
desc: Gogi finds a way to talk to Sonu and asks her for money. Later, he approaches Pinku with the same request. Will Gogi manage to recover his money?

name: Gogi Needs More Money
desc: Gogi needs more money to supplement his income and make up for his losses on the fantasy app. However, Tapu gives him a phone instead of cash. How will Tapu deal with this situation in his web of lies?

name: Gogi Risks It All
desc: Gogi is caught between excitement and anxiety after putting in all his money on the fantasy app. With everything riding on this one game, will he walk away with his dream or face a tough reality?

name: Gogi Needs Money
desc: As the cricket season nears its end, Gogi feels the pressure to go big and cash in on one last opportunity. But with no money in hand, can he find a way to fund his dream?

name: Gogi Ki Nayi Bike
desc: Gogi is over the moon after winning big on the fantasy cricket app and finally getting his dream bike. But with success coming so easily, will he be able to stop himself before it turns into an obsession?

name: Gogi Ko Hua Munafa
desc: Gogi is thrilled after earning money through a fantasy cricket app. But will this excitement turn into an obsession?

name: Gogi Opens A Bank Account
desc: Gogi visits the bank to open a new account when Popatlal unexpectedly finds his Aadhar card there. Sensing something suspicious, Popatlal immediately calls Sodhi. Will Gogi get caught?

name: Raato Raat Ameeri
desc: Gogi gets tempted when Rocky introduces him to fantasy cricket with promises of quick money. With his dream bike in sight, will Gogi give in?

name: Rocky's Surprise
desc: Tapu Sena heads to their favourite pizza place for a fun evening, but Goli surprises them with news about their childhood friend Rocky. What surprise does Rocky have in store for him?

name: Cricket Ka Bhoot
desc: Cricket fever takes over the neighbourhood as Tapu Sena gets ready to enjoy the big match. Gogi and Tapu make things more exciting with a pizza bet on their favourite teams. Who will win the bragging rights?

name: Gogi's Dream Bike
desc: With stars in his eyes and his heart set on his dream bike, Gogi turns to his father, Sodhi, hoping he'll make his wish come true. Will this dream ride become a reality?

name: Tala Kisne Maara?
desc: Jethalal remains trapped inside his apartment, struggling to find a way out. The mystery deepens as he wonders who could have locked the door in the first place.

name: Champaklal Meets His Friend
desc: Goli, Gogi, and Pinku try to protect Iyer's car, while Tapu returns with Champaklal after introducing him to his friend. Meanwhile, Jethalal learns that Champaklal has met his friend and is on his way back.

name: Bapuji's Race Against Time
desc: Bapuji is on his way to meet his old friend Mannu before he leaves for America, but a blocked road forces them to take a longer route. Will he still be able to make it on time?

name: Mannu Se Mulaqat
desc: After being trapped inside the house, Bapuji finally gets out and rushes to meet his childhood friend before he leaves for treatment in America. Will he reach in time?

name: Tala Kaise Tode?
desc: Jethalal and his family are still locked inside, and despite everyone's efforts, no one can figure out a way to get them out. Will they be rescued in time?

name: Ghar Ki Chaabi
desc: With the door locked from outside, Jethalal, Tapu, and Bapuji try everything to get out of the house. But nothing seems to work. Will they manage to escape?

name: Locked Inside
desc: Bapuji plays a heartfelt tune on his harmonica in memory of his old friend and gets ready to go meet him. But just as he's about to leave, he realises the main door is locked from the outside. Will he be able to get out?

name: Champaklal Has Tears In His eyes
desc: Champaklal scolds Jethalal for delaying the door repair. Later, at the soda shop, Taarak shares a sher with everyone. Later, Jethalal finds Champaklal crying, but what's the reason behind his tears?

name: Jethalal Ko Hua Profit
desc: Jethalal is thrilled as his sales surpass last year's numbers, prompting Natu Kaka and Bagha to request a salary increment. However, his joy turns to worry when he returns home and finds Bapuji missing.

name: Naya Saal Nayi Shuruat
desc: As the new year begins, the residents of Gokuldham Colony are in high spirits, ready to embrace new beginnings. What surprises and adventures await them in the coming year?

name: Gudi Padwa In Gokuldham
desc: The Bhides take the initiative to prepare a variety of jackfruit dishes for Gudi Padwa, adding to the festive spirit as all of Gokuldham Colony comes together to celebrate the auspicious day.

name: Kathal Season
desc: Excitement spreads through the colony as Bhide distributes jackfruit to everyone, a gift from his uncle's farm. However, the women find themselves puzzled over how to cook it.

name: Goni Mein Kya Hai?
desc: The police arrive at Gokuldham Society after Popatlal discovers a mysterious gunny sack outside Bhide's house. What secrets lie hidden inside?

name: Bhide Ke Ghar Ke Bahar Goni
desc: Roshan discovers a suspicious sack outside Madhavi and Bhide's house and shares her concerns with the Mahila Mandal. Is this the start of a new problem?

name: Sawal-Jawab Ka Khel
desc: The Gokuldham men enjoy a question-and-answer game over soda. Later, Bhide is startled when he feels that Sakharam has started talking.

name: Kya Deal Hogi Pakki?
desc: Jethalal worries that he might lose the deal due to his delay. However, the person responsible for all the commotion arrives at Gada Electronics. Will he admit his mistake?

name: Jethalal Runs Late
desc: Jethalal finally manages to convince the driver to drop him at his shop, but he's running out of time. Will he miss out on the business deal?

name: Jethalal Gets Stuck In The Car
desc: Jethalal finds himself in trouble when his co-passenger suddenly flees, leaving him stuck in the car. Meanwhile, Bagha and Nattu Kaka anxiously await his arrival. Will he reach on time?

name: Jethalal Gets A Lift
desc: Hussain assures Bagha that he will arrive on time, while Jethalal faces multiple delays on his way to the shop. Later, he meets a man named Mahesh who offers him a lift. Will he make it on time?

name: Meeting Ka Din
desc: Jethalal is eager for his meeting with Hussain, but a series of delays keep him from leaving for the office. Will he make it on time?

name: Hyderabad Ka Order
desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka are delighted to see customers arriving early at Gada Electronics. Later, Jethalal receives a call from Hussain in Hyderabad regarding his order.

name: Verma Ji Ke Ghar Ka Siren
desc: The Gokuldham members grow frustrated with the alarm at Verma Ji's house and find a way to turn it off. Later, the Mahila Mandal admits to attempting to enter the house without permission.

name: Verma Ji Ka Ghar
desc: The Mahila Mandal goes for their daily vegetable shopping. Later, they visit Verma Ji's newly renovated flat, but their visit takes an unexpected turn when a sudden siren startles everyone awake.

name: Popatlal Creates A Scene
desc: Popatlal causes a commotion in the society over earth sacks dumped in the compound. Later, Bhide calls Bhoothnath to scold him for the mess.

name: Taarak Ke Liye Mithai
desc: Jethalal brings sweets for Taarak, but Taarak refuses to eat them because of Anjali. Later, Bhide plays a prank on Popatlal.

name: Gokuldham Ki Holi
desc: Gokuldham Society celebrates Holika Dahan with great enthusiasm, followed by joyful Holi festivities.

name: Sanskari Aur Samajhdar
desc: Tapu and Sonu reveal the truth, but Inspector Pandey remains suspicious. Their story is confirmed when Dia and Raj's parents arrive at Jethalal's house.

name: Tapu Aur Sonu Ka Interrogation
desc: Tapu and Sonu confess that they are not married and reveal the whole truth behind their decision to run away from the society.

name: Varmala Ki Katha
desc: As Jethalal and Bhide enter the society with Inspector Pandey, they are stopped by the Mahila Mandal. Later, Tapu and Sonu finally reveal the truth to everyone.

name: Bhide Files A Complaint
desc: Bhide files a complaint against Tapu at the police station. Meanwhile, Tapu and Sonu invite the society members to come home. Have they really gotten married?

name: Shaadi Ka Pavitra Bandhan
desc: The Gokuldham members search for Tapu and Sonu, while Tapu comforts Sonu, assuring her about their decision. But what are they really planning?

name: Bhide And Champaklal Realise Their Mistake
desc: The residents of Gokuldham search for Tapu Sena at Nehru Ground but find no sign of them. Meanwhile, Tapu and Sonu purchase varmala garlands.

name: Tapu Consoles Sonu
desc: Bhide discovers that Sonu has lied to him. Meanwhile, Tapu comforts Sonu as she feels guilty for deceiving her father. Later, Bhide informs Jethalal about Tapu and Sonu's sudden disappearance. What will happen next?

name: Bhide Ki Googly
desc: Tapu and his Sena come together to carry out their plan, but obstacles arise. Later, as Sonu attempts to leave the house, she finds Bhide blocking her path. How will she handle the situation?

name: Bhaag Ke Shaadi
desc: Tapu suggests that Sonu elope and marry. He seeks Tapu Sena's help. Will their plan work?

name: Sonu Ki Mangni
desc: Sonu has a troubling dream that the groom's family has approved of her. Panicked, she calls Tapu for help. How will Tapu and Sonu handle this situation?

name: Sonu Aur Tapu Ka Dukh
desc: Sonu feels emotional about leaving the society after her marriage. Later, she and Tapu meet and express their sadness together.

name: Sonu And Tapu's Grooming Day
desc: As Madhavi and Sonu head to the parlour, the Mahila Mandal catches them. Later, Bhide informs Champaklal that the ladkewale are coming to see Sonu.

name: Kar Bhala To Hoga Bhala
desc: Joshi Kaka presents Sonu with potential matches, but she turns them all down. Meanwhile, Kanji Kaka does the same for Tapu. How will Tapu and Sonu handle this situation?

name: Tapu And Sonu Get Reprimanded
desc: Bhide and Madhavi are disappointed with Sonu and scold her. Distressed, she calls Tapu for help. How will they resolve the situation?

name: Raja Mastana's Prediction
desc: Raja Mastana arrives at Gokuldham Society as part of Bhide's plan, leaving Tapu and Sonu stunned. He makes a prediction about their marriage. How will Tapu and Sonu escape this situation?

name: Bhide Ka Surprise
desc: Bhide invites Raja Mastana to Gokuldham in front of Sonu and Tapu. Later, he hints to Champaklal about a surprise in store. What could Bhide be planning?

name: Bhide Meets Raja Mastana
desc: Bhide and Madhavi dress up to meet Raja Mastana. What surprises await Tapu and Sonu?

name: Tapu Aur Sonu Ki Majboori
desc: Bhide discovers that Tapu and Sonu tricked him and Champaklal with Raja Mastana's help. Later, he takes Raja Mastana's number from Abdul. How will Tapu and Sonu handle the situation?

name: Sonu Ke Liye Ladka
desc: Joshi Kaka visits Bhide with a marriage proposal for Sonu. How will Bhide respond?

name: Champaklal Aur Raja Mastana Ka Aamna Saamna
desc: During his morning walk, Champaklal's friends propose a potential match for Tapu. Later, Raja Mastnana calls Tapu. What trouble awaits him?

name: Society Rules For Bhoothnath
desc: Bhide approaches Bhootnath to explain the society's rules. Meanwhile, Taarak questions Jethalal about Tapu's marriage.

name: Bhoothnath In Gokuldham
desc: The society members grow anxious after Popatlal insists he saw someone inside Mr. Verma's house. Who could it be?

name: Champaklal Ka Darr
desc: Champaklal is startled by a shadow he believes to be a ghost, while Sodhi, Popatlal, and Bhide try to reassure him. Is it really a ghost?

name: Bhoot Ka Darr
desc: Fear spreads through the colony as residents believe a ghost is lurking among them. Is there truth to their fears or just a misunderstanding?

name: Bluetooth Baba Ka Prediction
desc: Popatlal panics as he struggles to find a rickshaw. Will Bluetooth Baba's prediction come true?

name: Bluetooth Baba Ka Interview
desc: Popatlal is given the task of interviewing Bluetooth Baba. How will the conversation unfold?

name: Sakharam Par Kabootar Ke Daane
desc: To improve his chances of getting married, Popatlal starts feeding pigeons by placing grains on Bhide's Sakharam. Will Bhide tolerate this?

name: Special Day Ki Special Baat
desc: Tapu informs Bhide that he has something special to share with Sonu on this special day, leaving Bhide anxious. What could it be?

name: Jethalal Ka Jhoot Pakda Gaya
desc: Jethalal, already full from pretending to eat at Babita's house, is caught off guard when Anjali arrives. How will he manage the situation?

name: Jethalal Ki Duvidha
desc: Taarak suggests a way for Jethalal to enjoy meals at both his home and Babita's house. Will Jethalal be able to pull it off?

name: Lunch Invitation For Jethalal
desc: Tapu and Sonu fight it out over one point in a badminton match. Later, Jethalal gets an invitation for lunch from Babita and Taarak. Whose house will he go to?

name: Jethalal Ki Pol Pakdi Gayi
desc: Champaklal discovers that Jethalal is faking his illness. Later, his friends arrive to take him along. Can Jethalal stop him?

name: Bapuji's Trip
desc: Bapuji is eager to go on a trip with his friends, but Jethalal is hesitant to let him go alone. Will he find a way to join in?

name: Venukutti Questions Jethalal
desc: Mr. Venukutti bombards Jethalal with questions and complaints. Can Jethalal handle the tough interrogation?

name: Bagha Loses Venukutti
desc: Venukutti gives Bagha the slip and makes his way to Jethalal's shop. Will Jethalal manage to open the shutter before it's too late?

name: Cutter And Shutter
desc: Jethalal waits at the entrance of his shop along with Bawri and the locksmith while Bagha is on his way with Mr Venkutti. How will he enter the shop?

name: Bagha Tries His Best
desc: Bagha does everything he can to keep Mr. Venukutti occupied while Jethalal rushes to open the shop's shutters. Can he buy enough time?

name: Nakli Venukutti
desc: Bagha disguises himself as a driver to pick up Mr. Venukutti, while Nattu Kaka poses as him to fool the real driver. Will their plan succeed?

name: Venukutti's Arrival
desc: Jethalal hatches an elaborate plan to welcome Venu Kutti. He borrows Sodhi's car, to keep him distracted. Will his scheme unfold as planned?

name: Shutter Bandh
desc: Jethalal faces a crisis when he gets locked out of his shop on the day of a surprise inspection. Will he find a solution?

name: Surprise Visit
desc: Jethalal is in for a shock when he discovers that a complaint has been lodged against him, leading to his stock being blocked. A surprise inspection of his store is now scheduled, which will seal his fate.

name: Ramsang Se Panga
desc: Jethalal's business is on the line as Ramsang cuts off his stock supply. Will he be able to find a solution?

name: Dhanda Bandh
desc: Jethalal is in a state of panic as the company denies him the essential stock for his electronics store. What could be the reason behind this sudden boycott?

name: Jethalal Out Of Stock
desc: Jethalal discovers that his storehouse is out of electronics stock. What's preventing him from restocking his appliances?

name: Jethalal Ko Aaya Sapna
desc: Jethalal dreams that his business is booming, but Bapuji wakes him up. Will his dream turn into reality the next day?
